finding: Intraconal Lesion without Optic Nerve Involvement

differentials.name: Arteriovenous malformation least common of orbital vascular malformations
differentials.raw: Arteriovenous malformation least common of orbital vascular malformations (congenital, idiopathic, traumatic)

context: √  irregularly shaped intensely enhancing mass of enlarged vessels √  associated with dilated superior / inferior ophthalmic v. √  commonly adjacent to superior orbital fissure, inferior to optic nerve √  local bone erosion
